Unsere KRÖNUM-Dinnershow begeistert in diesem Jahr mit einem besonders atmosphärischen und einzigartigen Programm. 

Für ausgewählte Termine suchen wir eine vielseitige Künstlerin als Zweitbesetzung, die Gesang mit Tanz oder Akrobatik verbindet.

Gesucht wird eine Besetzung für folgende Termine:
17. & 18. April
08. & 09. Mai
04. & 05. Juni
07., 08. & 09. Juni
12. & 13. Juni

Bei Interesse freuen wir uns über eine E-Mail mit Referenzmaterial an **veranstaltung@turisede.de**.

Geheime Welt von Turisede
Kulturinsel Einsiedel 1
02829 Neißeaue OT Zentendorf

Casting Call "Frank"
Für unseren zweiten No-Budget-Kurzfilm "Cry Sam" suchen wir eine passende Besetzung für die Rolle des "Frank". 

männliche Rolle 

Spielalter: 35 bis 40 Jahre 

Drehzeitraum: 05. bis 09. Oktober 

Drehort: Neckar-Odenwald 

Weitere Infos zum Film & der Rolle könnt ihr der Outline entnehmen. (Das Bild in der Outline dient lediglich der Illustration und ist nicht bindend oder unsere Erwartung.)

Richtet eure Bewerbung mit Referenzen bitte an:

katlenafilms@gmail.com

Wir freuen uns auf euch :)

Lena & Ann-Katrin 

Katlenafilms

We are excited to announce our hit 2024 musical, Sigma Acapella, is back and better than ever, ready to hit the stage, November 2026, and audition submissions are officially open!

Follow the link in our linktree for the full audition package: https://linktr.ee/rushedproductions

items.text:
📸 CASTING CALL — MALE MODELS WANTED
Jude Neale | Premium Denim

We're on the lookout for male models to front our upcoming catalogue and editorial shoots for Jude Neale — a premium denim brand built on quality craftsmanship, and effortless style.

We're seeking men of all looks, ages, and backgrounds who carry themselves with confidence and feel at home in front of a camera.

📍 Shoots: Vancouver & Surrey, BC

💰 Rate: $40/hr | 4-hour minimum

📅 Ongoing opportunities for the right fits

Whether you're experienced or just starting out, we want to hear from you.

To apply DM me directly or email Luke@jnalvit.com with:

✔️ A few recent photos

✔️ Your height & Waist measurements.

✔️ Your availability / any prior experience

Tag a friend who should be in front of our lens.

items.text:
WROCŁAW // TRUDNE SPRAWY
Cześć,

Nadal poszukujemy aktorów do nadchodzącego odcinka "Trudnych Spraw" do następujących ról:

UWAGA - proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

OBAJ mają trzy dni zdjęciowe:

15.04 (ŚRODA), 16.04 (CZWARTEK), 17.04 (PIĄTEK)

KAROL Tarnowski (22 - 28 lat) – ekonomista. Jego ojciec, emerytowany policjant, zaszczepił w nim uczciwość. Przestrzega zasad, nienawidzi kłamstw. Karol niedawno się ożenił, cieszy się, że jest głową rodziny, uczy żonę, co jest dobre, a co złe. Zadbany, schludny. Bardzo kocha ojca i uważa go za wzór do naśladowania. Kocha młodą żonę Hannę, ale lekko protekcjonalną miłością. Wysoki, zgrabny, przystojny chłopak.

MIŁOSZ Tarnowski (47 - 53 lata) – ojciec Karola. wdowiec, niedawno stracił żonę. Atrakcyjny, wysoki, wysportowany, wyraźnie umięśniony, ale uprawia sport od dzieciństwa, a nie po to, by znaleźć nową żonę. Jest dumny, że syn wiele się od niego nauczył i przestrzega zasad. Ma małą bliznę na policzku.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia oraz zapewniamy nocleg.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule

"Trudne Sprawy, odc. 1352 + IMIĘ postaci"

wraz z AKTUALNYM zdjęciem oraz wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby)

WhatsApp'em numer:

+48 798 970 883

lub na maila:

lukasz.wrzeszczynski-siuda@polotmedia.pl

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach i przedziale wiekowym 😊

Czekam na kontakt!

items.text:
Do nowego odcinka serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam Panów:

- Bobas, Rafał Bobiński (34) – bandyta średniego szczebla, średnio bystry, dość bojowy, lubi pyskować. Dobrze zbudowany, o twarzy osiłka, do zadań fizycznych. Jasne dżinsy, biały tshirt, dresiarski wygląd. W zainteresowaniu policji. Uwaga: opcjonalnie może zagrać krótki fight z Kubą – do decyzji, jeśli uda się znaleźć odpowiednią osobę. AKTOR ZAWODOWY 
Data: 20.04 i 21.04
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za 2 dni

- Jarosław Fryc (39) – bandyta wyższego szczebla, cwany, zawsze wywija się policji. Skuteczny, bystry, umie zarządzać ludźmi, pewny siebie. Wynajęty do skoordynowania akcji porwania komendantów. Dobre dżinsy, koszula, wygląda jak sprawny fizycznie biznesmen. 
Data: 20.04
Stawka: 500 zł netto

- Adrian Marciniak (38) – przyjaciel Szymona, działa w półświatku, nie zrobił nic złego ale miał pecha i Bobas z Krzywym prewencyjnie go zabili. Średniej postury, nie ma wyglądu dresiarza.
Data: 21.04
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Paweł Kornecki (28)  – stalker, niedoszły gwałciciel. Ma obsesję na punkcie Marzeny, klient na jej portalu erotycznym. Niczym się nie wyróżnia. Krótkie włosy, tanie okulary. Pracuje jako kierowca. 
Data: 22.04 i 25.04
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

- Nikodem Janiak (24) – drobny diler, złodziej. Typ dresika-kryminalisty. 
Data: 21.04
Stawka:400 zł netto

- Właściciel (weterynarz) (48) – właściciel przychodni weterynaryjnej, miłośnik zwierząt. Dobry, poczciwy człowiek, ale trochę naiwny. Barwny wygląd, nietypowe ubranie. 
Data: 22.04
Stawka: 400 zł netto

POSZUKIWANE AUTO NA PLAN 
na 12 kwietnia 2026 r. do scen w warsztacie potrzebujemy auto statystyczne nie za duże typu yaris, golf - w kolorze szarym, granatowym, bez ciemnych szyb
Warszawa, wynagrodzenie 180 zl netto 
Zgloszenia wraz ze zdjeciem pojazdu prosze kierowac na maila: paulina@sceneria.com.pl dopisek auto

Dir wird hin und wieder gesagt:

„ Dir fehlt Ausstrahlung, Charisma und zudem stört mich deine Stimme!“
Dies sind Worte, die weh tun.

Ich helfe Dir, genau an diesen Dingen zu arbeiten und Du wirst bald sehen, welche Verwandlung,Fortschritt und Entwicklung Du machen wirst, und dies nicht nur im Außen, sondern auch im Innen!

Ich freue mich auf genau Dich!

Eure / Ihre 
Annette Kuhn

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 15/2026

DER GEWINNER DES GOLDEN BÄREN 2026 UND HOMMAGE AN EINEN WELTSTAR

Blockbustertechnisch läuft mit der Horrorkomödie READY OR NOT 2 ein Leckerbissen für alle Genrefans an.

Eine feinfühlige Künstlerbiografie präsentiert das Cinema Paradiso in St Pölten mit ITS ALL OVER NOW, JEFF BUCKLEY sowie haben wir den Gewinner der Berlinale im Programm, GELBE BRIEFE.

Sie ist vor allem für ihre Rollen bekannt, reife, empathische und oft elegante Frauencharaktere darzustellen. Wir konnten mit Jasmin Ebraheim über Ihre Arbeit ein ausführliches Gespräch führen. 

In Punkto Musik lassen wir uns inspirieren mit Musik aus Kinofilmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 8.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING DO FILMU FABULARNEGO

Poszukujemy aktorów i aktorek do głównych ról w nowym, poruszającym dramacie wojennym.

📍 Terminy castingu (na żywo):

– Warszawa – 18 kwietnia

– Wrocław – 2 maja

– Gdańsk – 7 maja

🎭 Poszukiwane role:

DZIEWCZYNA (15–20 lat) – rola główna

Wrażliwa, inteligentna, naturalna. Rola wymagająca dużej autentyczności i głębi emocjonalnej.

MATKA (35–45 lat)

Ciepła, silna, oddana rodzinie. Postać pełna emocji i wewnętrznej siły.

OJCIEC (40–50 lat)

Spokojny, odpowiedzialny, obecność sceniczna, subtelna gra emocji.

MŁODSZA SIOSTRA (8–12 lat)

Naturalna, ekspresyjna, emocjonalna relacja z główną bohaterką.

🎥 Doświadczenie mile widziane, ale nie jest wymagane – najważniejsze są naturalność i autentyczność.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

**juliarokietek@gmail.com**

W wiadomości prosimy podać:

– imię i wiek

– miasto zamieszkania

– aktualne zdjęcia (portret + sylwetka)

– krótką informację o sobie / doświadczeniu

Wybrane osoby zaprosimy na casting stacjonarny.

Zapraszamy! 🎭

topComments.text: Natalia mail wysłany .
Mejl Poleciał

Hi everyone! I’m Baz, I work for popiin. 
We’re seeking an outgoing female (25-30) actress in London to star in a promo shoot exploring London’s nightlife. 
This project captures the real experience - fun, chaotic, and controversial moments that define nights out in the city.
If you’re interested, feel free to DM me and I’ll share all the details (location, time and fee) privately. Cheers!

items.text:
**🎬 [CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM | LONDON]**

Hi everyone!

I’m currently casting for a **5 - 7 minute psychological drama short film**.

This project is a **director’s showcase piece** for film school application (NFTS), focused on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

**SAYSORRY.ME**

The story follows a man trying to reconnect with someone he loves - but something feels wrong. The film explores **loss, regret, and the illusion of communication** in a quiet, intimate, and unsettling way.

The tone is grounded and realistic, with subtle psychological tension.

## **🎬 PROJECT PURPOSE **
* Director portfolio / film school submission
* Strong focus on performance, sound design, and visual storytelling
* Intended as a high-quality cinematic short

## **🎭 ROLES**
1. **LEAD (Male, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PARTNER (Any gender, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PRESENTER (Female, 20-35)**
* Commercial-style performance
* Confident, warm, slightly “too perfect” tone
* Ability to speak directly to camera

## **📍**LOCATION 
* London, Battersea Power 

## **📅 SHOOT DETAILS** 
* Shoot date: TBC (mid-April)
* Casting deadline: **20th April (URGENT)**

## **💸 COMPENSATION **
* **Unpaid project**
* Travel (London zones) covered
* Food & drinks provided during the shoot
* Film credit + material for showreel

## **📩 TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

Please DM or apply via StarNow [https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/](https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/)

Looking for strong, intentional performers for a cinematic short film in LA/IE
I’m casting:

— THE MYSTERY MAN (Antagonist)

— THE CAPTURED MAN (Lead)

— HENCHMEN (2)

This is a performance-driven project focused on presence, tension, and visual storytelling. Looking for actors who can bring depth, control, and authenticity to the screen.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPzBPEl-aXySCqn5cB0yRcU0VB1GO85LhcBho1bD6HYHOrKw/viewform

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Foran Upcomingproduction by Jayda Chippie Carcamo Casting Call Looking for 2 Males -Must be the same exact height twins individuals of identical height/ Strong physical awareness and ability to perform slow, precise movements Comfortable performing full costume black wardrobe, ski masks) .Silent, and controlled Move with purpose minimal but impactful «Almost mechanical ori sync with one another -Filming will require coordination and timing between both performers -No dialogue; performance entirely physical ·Height must ·Holght/ustmathperterr match partner applying as pair) ·Recentphotos -Recent photos Email: Chippiecarcamo@yahoo.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL THE CAPTURED MAN Role Type: Lead Age Range: 25 30 Ethnicity: Black Character Descrip Description A man thrown into violent situation he doesn't belong in. When we meet him, he is bruised, bloodied, and terrified pleading for his life. Requirements Strong emotional range (fear, panic, confusion, determination) Ability to carry intense, dialogue- heavy scenes Expressive facial reactions and physical storytelling Must convincingly portray exhaustion, injury and sur vival Physical/Styl Requirement Must be comfortable wearing bloody makeup and prosthetics Submission Requirements: Headshot+ recent photos Height and basic stats Acting or clips available) Contact information'

May be a graphic of text that says 'Directed by Jayda Chippie Carcamo SHORT FILM CASTING CALL THEMYSTERYMAN Role RoleType:Antagonist/AuthortyFigure ype:Antagonist Authority Figure Age Range: 25-30 Ethnicity: Black CharacterDescription: Calm, controlled, and deeply unsettling. 한화식민 Performance requirements Strong, commanding presence with minimal movement Ability to convey power through stillness Controlled, grounded vocal delivery Has West demeanor or accent subtle expression Must be willing to wear VStylistic bottom grill visible top tooth detail Headshot recent recentphotos photos Height and basic stats Acting reel clips favailable) Contact information IMEPVOTE 0QU0S2'

items.text:
Urgent Casting Call ⚠️🎬

Bournemouth 11th - 16th April. You must be available for all dates. 

Low budget, unpaid. However, all expenses and accommodation are covered. 

--

Our lead has dropped out last minute and we need someone to take the role. 

Old Richard True
playing age 45 - 65
"confused, haggard"

Must be comfortable playing a man with Dementia. 

If you are interested or know anyone who may be, please reach out it would be a huge help. 

--

Script will be sent upon interest. 

The film is a heartfelt, character-driven drama centred on a successful radio presenter caring for her elderly father as he rapidly declines with dementia.

Comment if interested, or email ethanasomekh@gmail.com

items.text:
Share your words at our next Story Exchange on Thursday 16 April 2026 at Muswell Hill Books & Parlour, London, UK. 

Our last one sold out, so make sure you don't miss it. Go to the Where Writers Go website to grab your tickets. 

You can perform poetry, fiction, or extracts of one person plays in our 5 or 10 minute performance slots. 

Kathryn Georghiou will host the night, kicking things off with some of her writing. Then it's over to you, the booked performers, to share your work with our supportive and welcoming audience. 

Story Exchange is a Where Writers Go and Muswell Hill Books collaboration, and you will receive 15% off any books purchased in the bookshop on the night. 

That's not all, we have a licensed bar and time built in to chat with all the performers and audience alike. 

If you want some writing inspiration, be sure to check out the Where Writers Go podcast. You can find it on the website. 

See you there!

📍 **Drehort:** Heidelberg (Start: Langer Anger 38 – Firmensitz IMMO 4.0 GmbH)
🗓️ **Datum:** Freitag, 27.03.
⏱️ **Dauer:** max. 3 Stunden

🎯 Projekt

Für einen UGC-Videodreh (20 Reels à 40–60 Sekunden) suchen wir einen passenden Schauspieler.
Die Texte werden **vorgesprochen (Teleprompter vorhanden)** – kein Auswendiglernen notwendig.

Gedreht wird an **1–2 Immobilien in Heidelberg** (gemeinsame Anfahrt vom Büro).

👤 **Gesuchtes Profil**
* Mann, **30–40 Jahre**
* Gepflegtes, **seriöses Erscheinungsbild**
* Typ: **junger, gehobener Geschäftsmann**
* Stil: **Business / Business Casual**
* Natürliches, authentisches Auftreten vor der Kamera
* Deutschsprachig (akzentfrei)

💸 **Vergütung**
* **500 € pauschal**
* **inkl. aller Nebenkosten & MwSt.**

📩 **Bewerbung**

Bitte **ausschließlich per WhatsApp** an unseren Videografen:

**Luca Falk, Nummer: 01792014052**

👉 Gewünscht:
* kurzes **Bewerbungsvideo**
* aktuelle **Bilder**

items.text:
For my bachelor graduation film at Salzburg University of Applied Sciences (FH Salzburg), I am looking for the second lead actor for the short film “Head Over Heels”.
Head Over Heels is a stylized 80s slasher short film about a complicated father-son relationship, combining classic horror with psychological tension.
CHUCK
Gender: Male
Playing age: 14–18
Role: Second lead
Language: English (American accent required)
Shooting days: Multiple days (major role)
Description
Chuck is Charles’ son and the unwilling partner in his father’s magic shows and petty thefts. Intelligent, cynical, and emotionally exhausted by their life.
He loves his father but is slowly losing respect for him. Chuck sees reality more clearly than Charles: their life is unstable, dangerous, and offers little future.
His frustration often appears as sarcasm and emotional distance. Beneath that exterior, however, is a vulnerable teenager who simply longs for stability and a normal life.
The role requires a strong emotional range, from dry irony to intense desperation.

Synopsis
Charles and his son Chuck make a living through a combination of magic shows and petty theft. When they accept an invitation to perform at a birthday party, the job initially seems harmless. However, the hosts begin to behave strangely. Soon they discover that the seemingly friendly postman they met earlier has a deeply disturbed idea of family and has chosen Charles to become his new father. What started as a simple gig turns into a deadly game.

Project Information
Title: Head Over Heels
Genre: 80s Slasher Horror
Format: Short Film / Bachelor Graduation Film
Location: Ebreichsdorf, Austria
Shooting Period: June 15 – June 21, 2026
Producer: Florian Peter
Director: Vanessa Brshanca
Language: The film will be performed in English. All actors must be fluent in English and able to perform with a convincing American accent.

items.text: Serdecznie zapraszamy na pełen wrażeń i pracy twórczej obóz musicalowy z Teatrem Muzycznym Tintilo!

sharedPost.text:
Wiosna w pełni 🌿☀️, ale wbrew pozorom to idealny moment, żeby pomyśleć o wakacjach! O niezwykłych wakacjach...🤩

Zapraszamy na Letnie Warsztaty Artystyczne Tintilo – pełne kreatywności i dobrej energii 🎨✨ To czas, kiedy dzieci i młodzież mogą rozwijać swoje pasje, eksperymentować ze sztuką i tworzyć coś naprawdę wyjątkowego. 💛
Czekają na Was inspirujące zajęcia, twórcza atmosfera i mnóstwo radości z tworzenia! 
Do zobaczenia w Tintilo 💛

zapisy: tintilo@tintilo.com
Więcej: www.tintilo.com/letnie-warsztaty-artystyczne

items.summary: Serdecznie zapraszamy na pełen wrażeń i pracy twórczej obóz musicalowy z Teatrem Muzycznym Tintilo!
items.title: Serdecznie zapraszamy na pełen wrażeń i pracy twórczej obóz musicalowy z Teatrem Muzycznym Tintilo!

items.text: Działo się na dachu centrum przesiadkowego w Zabrzu.

sharedPost.text:
Publikujemy po latach archiwalne nagranie z przewodniczącym związku zawodowego statystów Artur Grala na dachu ściśle chronionego obiektu strategicznego użyteczności publicznej w mieście Zabrze, tuż przed meczem Ekstraklasy na nowoczesnym obiekcie Górnika. 

Wrzucam nagranie bez autoryzacji samemu nie słuchając całości ze względu na odbywającą się aktualnie 28 kolejkę ligi krajowej ukochanej.

Dziękuję za wspaniałe przyjęcie podczas mojej wizyty słyszalne w obrębie kilku kilometrów na terenie miasta, poczułem się jak prawdziwy oficjel z zawodu dyrektor samozwańczo się na to miano powołany i nie zamierzający podania się do dymisji do dnia dzisiejszego, i co mi mogą zrobić służby i inne instytucje wszelakie? 
Niewiele albo zgoła nic...😉

Ciąg dalszy tej relacji nastąpi w celu pokazania pięknej okolicy widocznej z obiektu.

Pozdrawiam wszystkich statystów trwających na straży rodzimej kinematografii.

Pamiętajcie, było dobrze, jest dobrze i będzie dobrze - bo już lepiej być nie może  ✌️🔥📽🎞🎬

🎬 CASTING – serial „Uroczysko”
Do serialu „Uroczysko” poszukujemy aktora 45+ do roli bezdomnego profesora.

Postać inteligentna, intrygująca, z wyraźną historią.
Charakterystycznym elementem są okulary, które podkreślają jego przeszłość.

📍 Zdjęcia: Wrocław
📅 Terminy: 14, 17, 20 oraz 24 kwietnia
(rezerwacja: 21 i 22 kwietnia)

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:
casting@agencjazgrani.pl

W treści prosimy o:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• numer kontaktowy
• wideowizytówkę
• próbkę aktorską

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

sharedPost.text:
**CASTING CALL**

  We at Ember Production are looking for some SA’s the next shooting day for The Eight Saga: NEST Project in on Saturday the 25th of April and filming in Ambleside in the Lake District.

  This is a one day shoot and we are looking for the following-

1 x Barmen 50’s +

25 x Farmer Boys and a few Farmer Girls any age 

These are non speaking roles and IMDb credits are given and a massive opportunity to be given lots of time in front on the camera to be part of this amazing project.

  To all that are interested please send me a message on my WhatsApp on 07894943405 with your full name, age, email address & headshot please 🙏🏼 

P.s it can just be a picture that you have taken on your phone with no hats or shades on please 🙏🏼 

We are very excited for having you on board and working with you 🫶🏼🫶🏼

  Below is the trailer for this feature film 🎥🎥🎬🎬🔥

sharedPost.text:
✨ Exciting Opportunity at the Academy! ✨

We’re thrilled to welcome Ember Productions to the academy on Sunday, 19th April 🎬

They are currently on the lookout for talented Make-Up Artists (MUAs) to join their creative team. This is a fantastic chance to come along, get involved, and showcase your skills in a live setting!

Take part in a hands-on photoshoot, working with cast members from the N.E.S.T Project, a great opportunity to build your portfolio and gain real industry experience.

Plus, there are additional roles available in production design, so if you’re interested in working behind the scenes, this could be perfect for you too!

Interested?
All contact details can be found in the below link post, don’t miss your chance to get involved!

https://www.facebook.com/share/p/14UPoNP7ZNK/

#MakeupArtist #CreativeCareers #PhotoshootOpportunity #ProductionLife #EmberProductions #NESTProject

items.text:
CASTING FOR A SURREALIST DRAMA SHORT FILM!!

DATES: 24th-26th APRIL

ROLE: April (Female, playing age 25-30, black): 

Our protagonist's sister, April acted as a sort of parental figure, "the brave one", to Aria throughout their childhood growing up with neglectful parents. They have shared trauma that has cemented their bond - they were not only sisters but best friends. 

LOGLINE: What begins as a normal conversation on an ordinary day takes an unexpected turn, leaving Aria lost in a world of her own and forced to confront the reality she has been avoiding since a recent tragedy. 

Unpaid, food & travel covered. 

Please email halfcoatproductions@gmail.com with spotlight/showreel!

topComments.text: I'm guessing the location is London because people in London don't tend to know there's a whole world out here!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID NON-UNION COMMERCIAL - Vancouver/Hope BC **

Romer Media is casting for a commercial shoot to be filmed on 

**April 13th** near **Hope, BC**.

**THREE FRIENDS**
Male or female, 20s
Fun, outgoing, energetic individuals. Talent do not need to know each other. We are simply looking for people with strong natural energy and comfort on camera.

**MOTHER**
Female, 30s–40s
Warm, natural, relatable, with a genuine on-camera presence. Looking for someone who can convey a strong and believable connection with a child.

**CHILD**
Male or female, approx. 5–8 years old
Playful, expressive, and comfortable outdoors. We are looking for a natural presence rather than polished performance.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* **Compensation:** $500/day
* **Non-union**
* **Shoot Date:** April 13th
* **Location:** Near Hope, BC
* **Mileage paid**
* **Must have a vehicle / reliable transportation**
* Talent will be required for one shoot day
* This is an outdoor lifestyle commercial
* No dialogue required unless otherwise noted
* No acting experience necessary

**SUBMISSION MATERIAL**
Please email the following to **[pieter@romermedia.com](mailto:pieter@romermedia.com)**:
* Recent photo(s)
* Name, age, and where you are based
* A short note about yourself
* Confirmation that you have access to a vehicle

topComments.text: Emailed !!
Is there any possible transportation?

items.text:
**Casting Call: Female Actors (20-30) – Sisters**

Looking for **two female actors, ages 20-30**, to play sisters in a **small scene** for my **directing class final**. No experience needed—this is a **fun, low-pressure way to try acting** and **get **on-set** experience**.

Perfect for anyone who wants a **small role to add to their portfolio**! The scene is **short and simple**, focusing on the sisters’ interaction.

**Date:** Needed **this Friday**
**Location:** Emily Carr University of Art and Design

Email ochenderson@hotmail.com if you’re interested. **All levels welcome. Thank you!**

topComments.text: How much is the pay rate?
Good luck Olivia!🤩🤗

items.text:
# **URGENT CASTING CALL!!! London!!!**

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking a male actor to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead).

Height must be between 5ft 8 - 6ft 1.

Age range 18-25 years old.

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We will be shooting a scene a day, so filming days will be short.

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested please email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting call! Looking for a male actor. 18 8-25, 5ft 8 25, 6ft 1 Io play a lead in a EGS! romatic, silent era, short comedy. Legs Is a student short film production. Shooting is between April 23rd 30th. If intrested please contact: i.pugh h0320251@art s.ac.uk s.ac.'

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – “The Spaces Between” 🎬

Hi, I’m Joe Gater, and I’m currently casting for a short film project titled The Spaces Between, created as part of a college assignment.

Roles Needed:
 • 2 male actors, aged 18

Details:
 • This is an unpaid role (paid in experience), ideal for those looking to build their portfolio/showreel
 • Food and drinks will be provided on set
 • Filming will take place before June (exact dates TBC)
 • Character names and full script will be shared upon casting

Audition Requirements:
 • Please send either a portfolio/showreel or an audition of your choice for consideration

If you’re interested or would like more information, please comment below or message me directly!

🎥 Great opportunity to gain on-set experience and be part of a creative project.

items.text:
NOW CASTING — Please Share

We’re casting real people; you, your friends or family who have macular and retinal conditions that affect the center of vision — including Macular Degeneration (Wet or Dry AMD), Diabetic Retinopathy, Stargardt Disease, Central Serous Chorioretinopathy (CSC) and similar diagnoses.

These conditions can lead to Central Vision Loss — when the center of what you’re looking at becomes blurry, distorted, or missing while your peripheral vision stays clearer.

If any of these sound familiar: 

• You have a central blind spot

• You turn your head or look slightly away to see more clearly

• Reading a website feels frustrating, slow, or tiring

We want to hear from you.

Share what reading online is really like with central vision loss.

This is a PAID project for a Non‑Union video shoot.

Fees if booked:

• Zoom session from home: $750

• Live studio session in LA: $750 (LA locals only)

LA locals may be booked for one or both.

There is no cost to take part in this casting.

 Email: cvloss@donnagrossmancasting.com

items.text:
Hey folks! Renegade Theatre Company is looking to fill the position of Assistant Stage Manager ASAP for their summer community theatre production of A Midsummer Night's Dream. 

Rehearsals are Tues/Thurs nights and Sat mornings in the Virginia Highlands area. Our read-through is this Saturday 4/11 from 10am-2pm

Show dates are Thurs- Sun 6/11-6/20 (8pm shows Thurs-Sat, 2pm Show Sun and 6/20)
Strike 6/23

Tech Week 6/6-6/10

Preference would be someone who is available majority of the rehearsal process and tech/performances, but if that isn't feasible we need someone available the following days plus tech/performances:

Tues: 4/21, 4/28, 6/2
Thurs: 4/30, 6/4
Sat: 4/25, 5/2, 5/9, 5/30

If interested or know someone who may be a good fit feel free to send me a DM or email RTC at renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com

items.text:
Spürst du das Kribbeln? Genau das ist dein Moment.  

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 steht in den Startlöchern und schon jetzt zeigt sich: Diese Staffel wird größer, wilder und spannender als je zuvor! 🚀  

Denn viele starke Talente haben sich bereits beworben… und trotzdem fehlt noch DU!  

💥 Stell dir vor:  
Licht an. Musik startet. Das Publikum schaut nur auf dich.  

Und du zeigst endlich, was in dir steckt.  

🎤 Ganz egal, was dein Talent ist:  
Ob du singst, tanzt, performst, Menschen zum Lachen bringst oder etwas komplett Einzigartiges kannst diese Bühne gehört dir!  

🌟 Was dich erwartet:  
• Eine echte Bühne mit Live-Publikum  
• Gänsehaut-Momente & pure Emotion  
• Eine Show voller Energie und Überraschungen  
• Die Chance, entdeckt zu werden  

⚡ Und das Beste:  
Schon jetzt ist klar – die Konkurrenz ist stark, die Acts sind vielfältig und das Niveau steigt.  

👉 Es wird ein Wettbewerb, den man nicht verpassen darf!  

🚀 Jetzt liegt es an dir:  
Willst du nur zuschauen… oder selbst auf der Bühne stehen?  

📅 Jury Castings: Mai, Juni & Juli 2026  

📝 Bewirb dich jetzt:  
👉 https://electricvisionscleve.de/casting.html  

🔥 Trau dich. Zeig dein Talent. Verändere deinen Moment.  

#evctalentcastingshow #casting2026 #jetztbewerben #talentshow #kleve #showtime #traudich

items.text: “Acting Up”, Valley Theatre’s Free Drama Program for Adults is back next Monday (13th April) 7pm with our next show theme – Monologues. We’ll be looking at scripts, classical and contemporary, that people can work on for the show and as audition pieces, with the usual friendly support from the Valley team. Room too for submissions from writers who have a short monologue to submit. More details from info@valleytheatre.co.uk

sharedPost.text:
We are now casting  for our touring  Summer  show Bring Me Sunshine.
The show is a musical  show featuring songs from around the world La Bamba, Viva Espana, Come Fly With Me,. Summer Holiday ,  Sway , and many more.
We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .
The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.
Rehearsals- 25th  -29th May
Playing Dates- 1st June -31st July
We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day) 
Casting Breakdown 
We are looking for drivers with cars only .
We are looking for performers on all area of the UK -please include bases when sending details.
We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road 

 Also

Adult Panto  Jack Off The Beanstalk is back in the West End for 2026 thew show will   open at Scala London in the heart of London’s West End!

We are now casting for the following roles for our pantomime 

Jack Trott
We are looking for an actor who can play our hero  funny humble  a strong singer musical theatre/pop sound as well as a good mover with dashing looks and a great physique.
Must be comfortable  gong off script at  and working an  audience

Dame Trott - Male 
We are looking for experienced Dames/character actors who are larger than life with bags of personality as well as versatility and natural comedy must be great at working an audience and have the gift of the gab 
Must be comfortable  going off script  and working an  audience

Billy Trott  
We are   looking for a  very   strong  comic to play Jacks  idle Brother 
Must be comfortable  going off script and  and working an  audience .

Princess Jill 
We are looking  for  a  strong  actress  to play Jill must have all the attributes  to play traditional  principal  girl 
 Misat be a great  singer/mover and must be comfortable  going  off script  and working  an audience.

We are looking for strong   Male and Female Dancers that sing well  and  play cameo roles .

The Dates 
Auditions in May in central London 
Rehearsals-Monday 30th November -11th December 
Playing dates 14th December -3rd  January 2027
We are offering an attractive buy-out fee to include rehearsals and shows .

Please email details/reels  to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

👏Amazing...No words can adequately describe it🎶❤️Close your eyes and listen to this excerpt. What scene from life do you think is being depicted here?
Hopefully, it will bring you joy and happiness.🥰👏

sharedPost.text:
Wow😲 🫣 that was a great jump. The Shen Yun dancer used her body to draw a heart.
💥   Don't worry – 👏😍 the dancers consulted the children's fathers beforehand and planned everything carefully.  
⚡️ See that energy ignite onstage. Don’t miss the magic of a live performance.
✨ Visit https://1kb.link/gSQBne for information on participating theaters 😊💖🎶
💫 Let yourself feel something unforgettable.

🎬 CASTING CALL: IDENTICAL TWINS (GIRLS, 10–12)

We’re scouting identical twin girls across South Africa for an upcoming paid feature film shooting in Cape Town (June–September 2026).

✨ Requirements:
• Identical twin girls
• Ages 10–12
• Mixed race / ethnically ambiguous look
• Must have a valid SA or international passport (travel to Belgium required)

This is an exciting international opportunity for young talent to be part of a major production 🌍

📩 To apply:
Email: studio@zestcasting.com

Include:
• Recent photos of both twins
• Names & ages
• Contact details
• Where they are based

⏰ Deadline: 13 April 2026

Tag parents, friends, schools, or agents who might know the perfect twins! 

#twins #southafrica #casting #featurefilm #capetowncasting #zestcasting

**POINTLESS** is coming back for a brand new series on BBC One!

 

We’re looking for pairs of fun and outgoing contestants who think they have what it takes to win the coveted Pointless trophy!

 

Filming is taking place in June, September and October.

 

Apply today at: [https://www.pointlessapplications.com/](https://www.pointlessapplications.com/)

attachments.ocrText: Casting flyer for Pointless, the BBC quiz show. Text reads: Pointless is back! Applications are now open for the new series of Pointless! We’re looking for fun and outgoing quizzing pairs to take part. Apply today at: www.pointlessapplications.com. Filming in June, September and October 2026. Closing date is midnight on 23 September 2026. All applicants must be 18+ and a current legal resident of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, Channel Islands or the Isle of Man. Terms and conditions apply. At the bottom is a picture of host Alexander Armstrong and the logos for the BBC and Remarkable Entertainment, the production company that makes Pointless.

items.text:
"Mechanic" for Short Film (20-30y/o)
Looking to cast a mechanic character for a short film. This scene would be shot either May 2 or 3, in a home garage. Should be a half day or less. It would not involve extensive use of tools, and is a pretty short dialogue scene. Bonus points if you have any experience working on cars at all, but not necessary.

Please message me if you're available and interested. This is a paid position located in Colorado Springs.

🎬 CASTING CALL — AS THE LIGHT FADES

RDE Films is casting for a psychological crime thriller shooting this June in Colorado.

We’re looking for grounded actors who can live truthfully in heavy, character-driven material.

⸻

ROLES:

[YOUNG PROTAGONIST]
Black Male | 14–18
Quiet. Observant. Carrying more than he should.
Must be able to deliver a strong emotional scene.

⸻

[FATHER FIGURE]
Black Male | 40–60
Strong presence. Controlled. A man of few words.

⸻

[SOUTHERN LOCAL]
Caucasian Male | 30–40
Heavy Southern accent. Blue-collar. Brief physical altercation.

⸻

Send: Headshot, Resume, Reel (if available)
📩 Casting@Rdefilms.com
Subject: ROLE – NAME

Local hires preferred.

items.text:
Hello everyone! I am shooting a student film this Friday April 10th and had 2 of my main actors bail. I am looking for 2 male actors, age 18-24. The film is called “X Marks the Pot” and this is the logline: A group of broke friends follow a map to a secret high-stakes poker game, only to be outplayed by an inexperienced kid with nothing to lose.  

If you can help me out please message me immediately or reply on this post! Thank you!

topComments.text: I have 2 male actors for you. Do you still need actors?
If you’d be open to gender-swapping one of the roles, I’d love to be considered! I’m local and available Friday 😊

items.text:
## Jurij Alschitz introduces QUANTUM PEDAGOGY for Theatre - The Actor in Superposition

World Theatre Training Institute Akt-Zent

A two-day seminar for **actors**, **directors**, and **teachers** who feel that linear thinking no longer corresponds to contemporary creative processes, and who are seeking a different way of working with knowledge, presence, and responsibility.

*For many years I have worked as a teacher and trainer, and increasingly I feel that classical models no longer explain what truly occurs between teacher, student, and the learning process itself. Quantum training is my personal field of reflection and practice — an attempt to reconsider knowledge, the lesson, training, and the responsibility of the teacher.*
*This seminar does not offer answers. It offers a change of position and an experience that each participant undergoes in their own way.*
*Dr. Jurij Alschitz*
items.previewTitle: quantum training for quantum pedagogy in theatre

items.text:
THE MEETING
A gripping and imaginative drama that stages a fictional encounter between two of the most influential leaders of the Civil Rights Movement: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Malcolm X. Set in a Harlem hotel room in 1965, the play brings these towering figures together for an intense, intimate, and deeply human conversation about justice, strategy, and the future of Black America.April 17th to May 3rd

items.summary:
THE MEETING
A gripping and imaginative drama that stages a fictional encounter between two of the most influential leaders of the Civil Rights Movement: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Malcolm X. Set in a Harlem hotel room in 1965, the play brings these towering figures together for an intense, intimate, and deeply human conversation about justice, strategy, and the future of Black America.April 17th to May 3rd

items.text:
📸 Poszukuję modelek do sesji sensualnej!
Cześć! 👋  

Jestem młodym, pełnym pomysłów początkującym fotografem, który dopiero zaczyna swoją przygodę ze zdjęciami i buduje swoje portfolio.

Szukam chętnych modelek do współpracy przy sesjach sensualnych – zależy mi na stworzeniu klimatycznych, estetycznych i subtelnych ujęć, podkreślających naturalne piękno i kobiecość.

✨ Oferuję:

– luźną, komfortową atmosferę podczas sesji  

– kreatywne podejście i świeże pomysły  

– zdjęcia do Twojego portfolio  

📍 Lokalizacja: cała Polska w twoim domu lub plener  

📩 Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana – napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej!

Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia – liczy się chęć i otwartość 💫

items.text:
# **URGENT CASTING CALL!!!**

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking a male actor to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead).

Height must be between 5ft 8 - 6ft 1.

Age range 18-25 years old.

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We will be shooting a scene a day, so filming days will be short.

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested please email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting call! Looking for a male actor. 18 8-25, 5ft 8 25, 6ft 1 Io play a lead in a EGS! romatic, silent era, short comedy. Legs Is a student short film production. Shooting is between April 23rd 30th. If intrested please contact: i.pugh h0320251@art s.ac.uk s.ac.'

topComments.text: Urgent come work for me for Free 🤣! No pay no way - have you even purchased volunteer filming insurance ? Genuine student production get funded from the University to pay actors
No such thing as unpaid and urgent, regardless of the 'opportunity'

items.previewDescription: Should actors maintain eye contact for an entire self-tape? Discover why constant eye contact can make auditions feel unnatural and how shifting your eyeline helps build the world of the scene. Learn practical self-tape tips used by professional actors to create more believable, cinematic auditions

items.text:
We are now casting  for our touring  Summer  show Bring Mer Sunshine.

The show is a musical  show featuring songs from around the world La Bamba, Viva Espana, Come Fly With Me,. Summer Holiday ,  Sway , and many more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 25th  -29th May

Playing Dates- 1st June -31st July

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are looking for drivers with cars only .

We are looking for performers on all area of the UK -please include bases when sending details.

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

✨ CASTING CALL – TRIPLE THREAT PERFORMERS ✨

Fairytale Celebrations UK are seeking triple threat performers of East Asian descent for an exciting high-energy tribute act, with nationwide bookings confirmed for Summer 2026.

We are looking for strong performers who excel in:
🎤 Singing
💃 Dance (commercial / K-pop style preferred)
🎭 Performance & audience interaction

📍 Rehearsals: Manchester-based
🚗 Work: Nationwide bookings
💷 Pay: £50–£90 per hour (dependent on event) + paid travel

This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a professional, high-quality production with a focus on authentic representation and dynamic performance.

To apply, please send:
• Headshot
• Vocal reel
• Dance reel (if available)

📧 info@fairytalecelebrations.co.uk

Join us for a summer of high-energy performances, incredible audiences, and unforgettable experiences ✨

items.text:
Casting Call:  🎬 PAID ON-SCREEN TALENT NEEDED – BIRMINGHAM

We’re looking for confident on-screen talent to feature in short video content for a small solicitors firm.

📍 Filming in and around Birmingham
💷 £50 flat fee (approx. 4 hours)

You’ll be performing a mix of roles — including client-style scenarios, informational content, and some lighter, more engaging videos.

We’re looking for someone who:

Is natural and confident on camera
Can deliver lines clearly and convincingly
Is reliable and easy to work with

🎭 Showreel required

⭐ Potential for ongoing paid work for the right person

📩 Comment below or DM with your showreel + headshot

topComments.text: As you were told when you posted this elsewhere, you don't pay minimum wage to film an advert for businesses charging high prices. And seeking someone who has to pay to get to Birmingham means finding someone who will be working for nothing.
Available with experience, but you’d have to do something about the money to make it worth it ￼

items.text:
AIB LIVE is launching a worldwide search for exceptional martial artists to compete in a major new internationally distributed streaming series.

**MARTIAL ARTS SUPERSTAR** is a brand-new global streaming competition series designed to discover the most exciting martial arts talent in the world.

This is not just about fighting!!

We are looking for individuals who combine:

• High-level martial arts skill
• Athleticism & discipline
• Charisma & personality
• On-camera presence
• Acting ability

 

The winner will receive:

-        A cash prize

-        Winner’s trophy

-        Placement with a top international talent agency

-        Global streaming exposure

 

**WHO CAN APPLY?**

• Male & female martial artists
• Age 18–45
• Any nationality
• Any discipline (MMA, Kung Fu, Karate, Taekwondo, Muay Thai, BJJ, Capoeira, Weapons, Stunt performers, etc.)
• Must be available to travel to London for filming

 

**ROUND 1 – VIDEO SUBMISSION (Max 1 min 30 sec)**

Please send a short video including:
1. Your name, age and country
2. When you started training
3. Your martial arts style(s)
4. Any acting or on-camera experience
5. A short demonstration of your skills

Upload your video (Google Drive / YouTube unlisted / Dropbox / WeTransfer) and email the link to:

**[martialartssuperstar.casting@gmail.com](mailto:martialartssuperstar.casting@gmail.com)**

Subject line:
**MARTIAL ARTS SUPERSTAR – Your Name – Country**

**DEADLINE: SUNDAY, 30 APRIL 2026**

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to submit a second video demonstrating their acting ability.
Finalists will then be invited to a live audition in London.

Subject: MARTIAL ARTS SUPERSTAR Your Name-0 Country BRAND NEW COMPETITION STREAMING SERIES FOR GLOBAL DISTRIBUTION Created, developed and exclusively owned by AIB LIVE Ltd, UK'

• Acting ability

 

The winner will receive:

-        A cash prize

-        Winner’s trophy

-        Placement with a top international talent agency

-        Global streaming exposure

 

**WHO CAN APPLY?**

• Male & female martial artists
• Age 18–45
• Any nationality
• Any discipline (MMA, Kung Fu, Karate, Taekwondo, Muay Thai, BJJ, Capoeira, Weapons, Stunt performers, etc.)
• Must be available to travel to London for filming

 

**ROUND 1 – VIDEO SUBMISSION (Max 1 min 30 sec)**

Please send a short video including:
1. Your name, age and country
2. When you started training
3. Your martial arts style(s)
4. Any acting or on-camera experience
5. A short demonstration of your skills

Upload your video (Google Drive / YouTube unlisted / Dropbox / WeTransfer) and email the link to:

**[martialartssuperstar.casting@gmail.com](mailto:martialartssuperstar.casting@gmail.com)**

Subject line:
**MARTIAL ARTS SUPERSTAR – Your Name – Country**

**DEADLINE: SUNDAY, 30 APRIL 2026**

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to submit a second video demonstrating their acting ability.
Finalists will then be invited to a live audition in London.

items.text:
Hi! I love the concept of this group and I am so grateful to be here! 🎞️

I’m Taylor — an aspiring Actress and Singer-Songwriter. I just graduated from USC and I work in Social Media Management. 

I am open to working with collaborators and filmmakers on TFP/Collaborative Shoots, so that I can build up my Reel/Portfolio. I’m open to working with different Brands, Photographers, Content Producers, Filmmakers, Ad Agencies, Artists, and Creative Directors! I’m open to both Paid and Unpaid Shoots as I build up my Career, Reel, Portfolio, and Brand. 

I’m always trying to get better & be able to grow and find new opportunities. My Instagram is @TaylorContarino and my Email is TayContarino@gmail.com. 

Thank you for your consideration!

items.text:
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!
ONLY ONE WEEK LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL, REAL PLAY!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here -

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS UNDER £15! 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

CAST 

@theflyingscotsmann 

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx 

@em_jsmith 

@sebastianvscott 

@esmepemburysmith 

@jonnymonk800m 

@samantha_oactor 

ASSISTANT DIRECTOR/STAGE MANAGER - @ermydecarvalho 

FOOTAGE BY - @jason_perryman 

PHOTOS BY - @build.better.stories 

#thingstodoinlondon

#offiesawards

items.text:
Musical Theatre Teacher - PQA Haywards Heath
Do you have experience working with children and young people aged 6-18? Do you have a passion for musical theatre and dancing, singing and acting? Are you looking for an opportunity to combine your skills and interests to develop young people in a fun and professional setting? Then PQA Haywards Heath is just the place for you!

Due to the success of our growing academy, The Pauline Quirke Academy of Performing Arts (PQA), a leading provider of weekend performing arts training, is currently recruiting MUSICAL THEATRE TEACHER for their Academy in Haywards Heath on Saturday mornings and/or afternoons. There may also be the opportunity for additional work for the right candidate.

You will need to have a good understanding of practical singing, dance, drama and performance techniques and be able to teach a range of genres which might include Pop, Musical Theatre, Acting Through Song and Musical Theatre on Film. There is also the opportunity to choreograph for PQA's West End Season, book musicals, showcases and live performances.

Ideally, applicants will be able to teach harmonies and choreograph full ensemble numbers to groups of children. Teaching experience would be beneficial but not essential as training and support will be given.

We are searching for fun, engaging and passionate individuals looking to bring lots of exciting and innovative ideas to our Musical Theatre module. If you are passionate about learning, the performing arts and making a positive impact on the lives of young people, we would be delighted to hear from you!

PQA follows safer recruiting. An enhanced DBS on the update service will be required and can be arranged. Applicants must be 18+.

To apply please email your CV with a cover letter explaining why you would be the ideal candidate for this role. Please send these direct to Principal Florence on florence.tingley@pqacademy.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

🚨 BIG NEWS ALERT! 🚨  
🌟 This is YOUR chance to be part of something extraordinary! 🌟  

I’ve officially joined an inspiring new project under the Forever Entertainment family, and let me tell you—it’s time for BIG change. In a world that’s losing its sense of connection, this American production is here to bring people together to create something meaningful.  

Though I’m new to Forever Entertainment, I’ve never been more convinced of a project’s potential. This is more than just entertainment; it’s a movement. We’re collaborating, creating, and giving people (maybe YOU) the chance to get their names in shining lights. It’s your time to step closer to the spotlight and be part of something much bigger.  

But guess what? Projects like this succeed with the power of US—of YOU. Together, we can make magic happen. Join this unique journey and help us crowdfund a production that the world truly needs right now. Let’s build something unforgettable.  

✨ Ready to leave your mark? Will you take the leap? Drop a 🔥 if you’re with me, and head to the link in bio NOW to get involved! Opportunities like this don’t wait. Let’s shine together.  

#ForeverEntertainment #CrowdfundDreams #LightsCameraAction #AmericanProduction #CollaborateAndCreate 
#BeTheChange 
#ShineTogether 
#FilmCommunity 
#SupportTheArts 
#YourNameInLights

items.text:
SØGER STATISTER PÅ 7-9 år🎥

📆Dato: 24/3 - 2026

⏰Tid: kl. 14.30 - 16.15ish

🏘️Sted: Rollespilshytten Hareskov, Ballerupvej 93, 3500 Værløse 👕'Kostume': Almindeligt tøj til vejret - vi har låne spejder tørklæder

Lidt om hvad og hvorfor:🌻Projekt 'Sammen om fritid' har til formål at oplyse om, hvordan fritidstilbud i Danmark med få greb bedre kan inkludere flere, der lever med usynlig handicap. Som en del af det er vi lige nu i gang med at lave nogle små film, der skal være med til at vise hvad de aktivitetsansvarlige i fritidstilbuddene konkret kan gøre.

🌳En af vores film tager udgangspunkt i en spejderkontekst. Vi har vores 8-årige hovedperson, MEN vi mangler nogle statister, der kan spille hans holdkammerater i spejdergruppen. Det kræver ikke man har spejdererfaringer, men man skal være frisk på at indgå i et par meget simple scener, hvor man sidder og er igang med at snitte i en pind, og så bliver bedt om at rejse sig og mødes et andet sted. 

Selve filmen har et budskab om, at det er vigtigt at gøre indholdet fleksibelt, så flere kan være med på deres både. 

Filmen bliver kun ca. 1,5 minut lang i sidste ende, og kommer til at ligge på hjemmesiden www.sammenomfritid.dk (lanceres først d. 1/5) samt på diverse SoMe-kanaler.

👉Hvis du har spørgsmål eller vil melde dit barn til, så skriv til mig på mma@videnomhandicap.dk

Mart ?

items.summary:
SØGER STATISTER PÅ 7-9 år🎥

📆Dato: 24/3 - 2026

⏰Tid: kl. 14.30 - 16.15ish

🏘️Sted: Rollespilshytten Hareskov, Ballerupvej 93, 3500 Værløse 👕'Kostume': Almindeligt tøj til vejret - vi har låne spejder tørklæder

Lidt om hvad og hvorfor:🌻Projekt 'Sammen om fritid' har til formål at oplyse om, hvordan fritidstilbud i Danmark med få greb bedre kan inkludere flere, der lever med usynlig handicap. Som en del af det er vi lige nu i gang med at lave nogle små film, der skal være med til at vise hvad de aktivitetsansvarlige i fritidstilbuddene konkret kan gøre.

🌳En af vores film tager udgangspunkt i en spejderkontekst. Vi har vores 8-årige hovedperson, MEN vi mangler nogle statister, der kan spille hans holdkammerater i spejdergruppen. Det kræver ikke man har spejdererfaringer, men man skal være frisk på at indgå i et par meget simple scener, hvor man sidder og er igang med at snitte i en pind, og så bliver bedt om at rejse sig og mødes et andet sted. 

Selve filmen har et budskab om, at det er vigtigt at gøre indholdet fleksibelt, så flere kan være med på deres både. 

Filmen bliver kun ca. 1,5 minut lang i sidste ende, og kommer til at ligge på hjemmesiden www.sammenomfritid.dk (lanceres først d. 1/5) samt på diverse SoMe-kanaler.

👉Hvis du har spørgsmål eller vil melde dit barn til, så skriv til mig på mma@videnomhandicap.dk

INNOVAID søger 2 drenge og 2 piger i alderen 4 - 6 år 

Vi søger 2 drenge og piger i alderen 4 - 6 år som medvirkede til optagelse af reklamevideo og billeder til et nyt spændende legetøjskoncept som vi lancerer.
Børnene skal lege med legetøjet, og der vil ikke indgå lysoptagelæser/ replikker.

Optagelserne vil foregå i Skødstrup nord for Aarhus – torsdag d. 9. april kl. 14 - 16 eller søndag d.12. april kl. 10 - 12. 
Det er ulønnet, vi tilbyder dog en mindre gave i forbindelse med deltagelse i optagelserne.
Skriv pb hvis du er interesseret!

sharedPost.text:
🎭 DIRECTOR WANTED for Brexitus Nexticus 🎭

Politics. Power. Chaos. Questionable leadership.
Ancient Rome… or 2026 Britain? 

We’re bringing Brexitus Nexticus to life — a bold, satirical comedy set during the Roman occupation of Britain, packed with big characters, physical theatre, and just enough truth to make people laugh… then wince.
🔥 We need a Director who can:
• Command comedy timing like a gladiator with a sword
• Shape physical theatre & ensemble movement into something electric
• Cast brilliantly - you'll have a say in assembling our cast
• create something unforgettable
🎬 You’ll be:
• Leading rehearsals and building the world of the show
• Unlocking bold performances and physical storytelling
• Collaborating with a passionate, slightly unhinged (in a good way) team
If you’ve ever thought,
“Roman politics… but make it painfully relatable”
— this is your moment.

📩 get in touch - Brexitustheplay@gmail.com 

🏛️ Because if nothing’s changed in 2000 years… we might as well laugh about it.

items.text:
EMERGENCY CASTING CALL FOR STUDENT SHORT!

Seeking actress age 18-23, for the role of a 15/16 year old closeted/pre-transition trans guy. I’ve had no luck with finding a trans actor, so this is my last resort. An androgynous/masculine look is preferred, but not required.  

Date/Time:
Saturday, April 11th from 12:50PM-6:00PM
Sunday, April 12th from 10:45AM-5:30PM

Location:
Saturday- Lowry Studios
Sunday- Aurora Highlands

This is a student short, so unfortunately it is unpaid, but you will receive a copy of the film when it’s finished.

Food/drinks will be provided both days. 

Please feel free to message me on here or over email at dominic.dhorton99@gmail.com

items.text:
Seeking 4-5 year old mixed race girl.Hispanic, southeast Asian southern European feel (Italian etc) for tv commercial. Pays approx $3000.  Must be able to shoot in Austin, Texas  as a local. If interested, please send the following information to agent@gotalentagency.com 
First/last name
Age
DOB
Parent name
Email 
Phone
One good head and shoulder shot looking at the camera, smiling. No hats or sunglasses.  
By submitting to this Casting call, you agreed to be represented by GO TALENT for this particular Casting. Do NOT IM me I do not check those messages. Thank you

topComments.text: If we fly in for the shoot are we able to do that or must be an actual local?
Do you know dates for the shoot?

The time has finally come everyone! As of 3-10-2026 'Gloria' (a feature film based on a real couple from El Paso, Texas in the 1930's) is available to rent or buy on Amazon Prime. This film was completely shot in El Paso, Texas.  Also available for DVD purchase on Amazon. 🎥🙂
Feel free to share and post on your social media pages to spread the word. If you would like to be part of our social media campaign feel free to send a direct message to our Gloria Instagram page viewing the film along with the names of those you'd like us to tag. You'll then see your picture or video pop up on our The Gloria Movie     Facebook page and Gloria Instagram page. 😊🎬 We have arrived to share with the public. Thank you Amazon Prime! 🙏🎬🎉🙌�

Gloria Instagram link below: 

https://www.instagram.com/thegloriamovie?igsh=dm5rYTVvZ3B6ZjBi

Amazon (Buy/Rent):

https://www.amazon.com/gp/video/detail/B0GL251YNY/

Amazon DVD:

https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GNW4X3X2/ref=atv_dp_oth_format_dvd_0

items.text: Join NANI in LA on April 9 & 18!

sharedPost.text:
Since April is my birthday month, celebrate with NANI and me by coming to these screenings in Los Angeles!! Yes!!!

1.NANI 
At the Pasadena Film festival
April 9, 1:30 pm, 
Noho 7 Laemmle Theatre    

 2. NANI 
At the Hollywood Blvd Film Festival 
April 18, 2:15, Let Live Cinema
(This may be NANI’s last day of her global festival run) 

@hbfilmfestival @pasadenafilmfestival @nirv4321 @b.khanfident @roomeen8 @moinky @nanishortfilm @sunita.s.mukhi @highlight

WARSZAWA 8.04.2026r.
film fabularny 

Szukam dublera:

- Mężczyzna ok. 35-50 lat, średniego wzrostu (ok. 1,7m) z wysportowaną sylwetką. Ponadto brunet, lekko wpadający w rudy. Mile widziany zarost.

STAWKA 250 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: DUBLER 

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Für unsere Independent-Webserie "Trag Mich" sind wir noch auf der Suche nach einem Hauptdarsteller im Raum Stuttgart.

Zum Projekt:

Die Webserie umfasst fünf Folgen à 20 Minuten und handelt von einer Stuttgarter Freundesgruppe Anfang zwanzig, die den Verlust eines gemeinsamen Freundes durch Suizid verarbeiten muss. Dabei geraten die Figuren in intensive Gespräche über Schuld und Verantwortung.

Zu besetzen ist die Rolle „Constantin“:

Groß, sportlich, kurze Haare, tiefe Stimme, engagiert und politisch organisiert. Ein Charakter, der lieber handelt, als über seine Gefühle zu sprechen. Das fällt ihm besonders schwer, seit seine kleine Schwester Suizid begangen hat.

Bewerbungen an tragmichkontakt@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'CASTING CALL HAUPTROLLE STUTTGART BASED Webserie -5Folgen à 20 Minuten CONSTANTIN SPIELALTER 24 (DARSTELLER 18-27) groß, sportlich, kurze Haare, markante Gesíchtszüge, 迎品 tiefe Stimme, politisch organisiert, Commiemacker, wird lieber aktiv, als über Gefühle zu sprechen LOGLINE Stuttgarter Freundesgruppe verliert ein Mitglied an Suizid und gerät in einen Verantwortungskonflikt DREHBLÖCKE August 2026 (2 Drehtage) + März 2027 (10-15 DT) FOTOS, GGF. SHOWREELS UND INFOS an tragmichkontakt@gmail.com'

items.text:
!!! Plus-Size Darsteller Düsseldorf gesucht !!! 

Für eine Kinofilmproduktion in Düsseldorf, Bonn, Nettetal und Umgebung wird eine sehr präsente plus-size Rolle für 15-20 Drehtage im Juli und August besetzt. 

Ich wirke bei diesem Projekt aktiv mit und möchte mit meiner Animation gezielt helfen, diese besondere Rolle sichtbar zu machen. Gesucht wird eine Schauspielerin oder ein Schauspieler, gerne plus-size, unabhängig vom Geschlecht, im Spielalter von etwa 40 bis 50 Jahren. Entscheidend ist nicht nur die Optik, sondern vor allem Präsenz, Ausstrahlung und eine starke performative Wirkung vor der Kamera. 

Gedreht wird im Zeitraum Juli bis August in Düsseldorf, Nettetal und Umgebung. Der Umfang liegt bei etwa 15 bis 20 Drehtagen. Es handelt sich um eine Low-Budget-Kinofilmproduktion, bei der diese Rolle bewusst auf Wirkung, Erscheinung und Charakter angelegt ist.  

Wenn Du selbst passen könntest oder jemanden kennst, der perfekt in dieses Profil fällt, dann teile dieses Video bitte direkt weiter. Genau solche Besetzungen entstehen oft nicht über Reichweite allein, sondern über Menschen, die den richtigen Kontakt herstellen. 

Kennst Du jemanden mit genau dieser Präsenz, der unbedingt von diesem Casting erfahren sollte? Schreib es in die Kommentare oder leite den Aufruf sofort weiter. 

Wen würdest Du aus Deinem Netzwerk sofort für diese plus-size Kinofilmrolle in Düsseldorf vorschlagen, und was macht diese Person vor der Kamera so besonders? 

Abo dalassen, Glocke aktivieren, Beitrag liken und bitte direkt weiterleiten. 

Kennst Du die richtige Person, markiere sie jetzt oder schick ihr diesen Casting-Aufruf sofort. 

Teile das Video in Deinem Netzwerk, damit diese Rolle nicht an der richtigen Person vorbeigeht. 

https://de.stagepool.com/share/255499/8594852d9dqa 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#PlusSizeDarsteller #KinofilmCasting #Düsseldorf #Schauspielcasting #FilmszeneNRW

items.summary: Es gibt noch sechs Plätze für den Juni Workshop ☺️
items.title: Es gibt noch sechs Plätze für den Juni Workshop ☺️

items.text:
CASTING CALL — DER WARTERAUM

Neue Quelle Theatre Collective

We are looking for two actors for our upcoming production Der Warteraum (The Waiting Room) — a manifest-play by Ido Gotlib, premiering at ACUD Theater Berlin in June 2026.

NIKO — male, approx. 20–25

A musician who tries to find the right notes to declare his love to Mute Greta, and who ultimately makes the most irreversible choice in the play. Tender, idealistic, emotionally raw. Cannot bear inaction while the world burns outside. Requires genuine emotional availability and experience with any mobile instrument.

GERHARD — male, approx. 45–60

An amateur painter who obsessively tries to capture the face of his deceased son on canvas, and who, in the end, shows the others what it means to carry grief — and still choose to move forward. A man of few words, dangerous at his breaking point, and capable of extraordinary tenderness. Requires emotional depth and the ability to hold silence with full intensity.

About the play:

Five people wake up in an isolated room. Behind a locked door — screams, explosions, signs of an undefined catastrophe. The room becomes the only place of existence: no one can leave without disappearing forever. A play about hope, despair, isolation, and the fragile will to act. Premiere at ACUD Theater — one of Berlin's key independent stages.

Details:

Premiere: 11 June 2026, further performances 12–13 June, ACUD Theater Berlin

Rehearsals: mid-April – June 2026, Berlin

Language: English (multilingual ensemble, accents welcome)

Director: Ido Gotlib (Liebermann Villa; Film University Babelsberg)

Casting sessions from: 10 April 2026

A note on compensation:

This production is currently unfunded as an actor fee — our project grant (ELES Scholarship) covers production costs only. However, Der Warteraum is the first in a planned series of productions by Neue Quelle, and the ensemble carries forward into future work. We are building a sustainable strategy for future productions with proper budgets. The project is also being submitted to theatre festivals including Fluctoplasma Hamburg, where fees are part of the picture. All collective members are students of Film University Babelsberg and UdK.

We'd love to meet you and tell you more.

To apply: neue.quelle.group@gmail.com

Please send a short introduction, photos, and a link to any previous work.

Casting sessions from: 10 April 2026

A note on compensation:

This production is currently unfunded as an actor fee — our project grant (ELES Scholarship) covers production costs only. However, Der Warteraum is the first in a planned series of productions by Neue Quelle, and the ensemble carries forward into future work. We are building a sustainable strategy for future productions with proper budgets. The project is also being submitted to theatre festivals including Fluctoplasma Hamburg, where fees are part of the picture. All collective members are students of Film University Babelsberg and UdK.

We'd love to meet you and tell you more.

To apply: neue.quelle.group@gmail.com

Please send a short introduction, photos, and a link to any previous work.

INNOVAID søger 2 drenge og 2 piger i alderen 4 - 6 år
Vi søger 2 drenge og piger i alderen 4 - 6 år som medvirkede til optagelse af reklamevideo og billeder til et nyt spændende legetøjskoncept som vi lancerer.

Børnene skal lege med legetøjet, og der vil ikke indgå lysoptagelæser/ replikker.

 

Optagelserne vil foregå i Skødstrup nord for Aarhus – torsdag d. 9. april kl. 14 - 16 eller søndag d.1. april kl. 10 - 12.

Det er ulønnet, vi tilbyder dog en mindre gave i forbindelse med deltagelse i optagelserne.

Skriv pb hvis du er interesseret!

items.text:
# **URGENT CASTING CALL!!! London!!!**

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking a male actor to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead).

Height must be between 5ft 8 - 6ft 1.

Age range 18-25 years old.

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We will be shooting a scene a day, so filming days will be short.

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested please email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting call! Looking for a male actor. 18 8-25, 5ft 8 25, 6ft 1 Io play a lead in a EGS! romatic, silent era, short comedy. Legs Is a student short film production. Shooting is between April 23rd 30th. If intrested please contact: i.pugh h0320251@art s.ac.uk s.ac.'

items.text:
🎅🏻 Father Christmas 🎅🏻
Want to join us as a larger-than-life character? Do you have a desire to bring joy and cheer to families and children nationwide? We want to hear from you! 

Audley End Enchanted Railway began  operating over 60 years ago with a wonderful, magical, miniature railway. As a member of the Audley End Performance Troop, you are a key part of bringing that magic to our visitors. 

Father Christmas Performer: 

Working with a troop of fellow actors with support from our Duty Manager, this role requires the ability to portray the iconic Father Christmas and bring the holiday magic to each and every visitor. 

Job Purpose: 

You’ll be engaging with visitors as a traditional Father Christmas in a provided costume as they travel to see you via our enchanting train ride. 

You will be asked to briefly interact with visitors, which will include handing out presents and having your photo taken.  

Key Responsibilities: 

To deliver a high-quality performance throughout the day. 

Being aware of the importance of your role, maintaining your character at all times while on shift. 

To balance your interactions with visitors, making sure you give equal time to all visitors as you interact with them. 

To maintain a positive and upbeat attitude throughout the duration of your shift. 

Displaying good listening skills, identifying customer needs and responding to them quickly. 

Showing a genuine interest in other people and willingness to help 

Adherence to all Company policies and procedures e.g. timekeeping, absence reporting procedures etc. 

Skills and Qualifications: 

Previous acting experience in panto, theatre or other visitor attraction centres (desirable but not essential). 

Previous experience as Father Christmas (desirable but not essential). 

Able to communicate clearly and confidently with the public. 

Ability to demonstrate good teamwork and co-operation. 

Hours of work: 

This casual contract will start on the 3rd of November 2026 with rehearsals, then we open to the public from the 21st of November until the 24th of December. 

Rate of pay: 

The rate of pay is £22.50 an hour. Pay dates are monthly on or around the 27th of each month. 

Apply Today! 

If you are interested in joining the team at Audley End Enchanted Railway, then please send us your CV: performers@aeer.co.uk

Job Type: Zero hours contract 

Pay: £22.50 per hour 

Benefits: 

Employee discount 

Free parking 

On-site parking 

Schedule: 

9 hour shift 

Monday to Friday 

Weekend availability 

Work Location: Audley End Enchanted Railway, Saffron Walden, Essex

Expected start date: 03/11/2026

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of christmas tree and text that says 'AUDLEY END Enchamed EncheantedRailwas Railwan Could you be our next Father Christmas?'

items.text:
** [CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM | LONDON]**

Hi everyone!

I’m currently casting for a **5 - 7 minute psychological drama short film**.

This project is a **director’s showcase piece** for film school application (NFTS), focused on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

**SAYSORRY.ME**

The story follows a man trying to reconnect with someone he loves - but something feels wrong. The film explores **loss, regret, and the illusion of communication** in a quiet, intimate, and unsettling way.

The tone is grounded and realistic, with subtle psychological tension.
** PROJECT PURPOSE **
* Director portfolio / film school submission
* Strong focus on performance, sound design, and visual storytelling
* Intended as a high-quality cinematic short
** ROLES**
1. **LEAD (Male, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film
2. **PARTNER (Any gender, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film
3. **PRESENTER (Female, 20-35)**
* Commercial-style performance
* Confident, warm, slightly “too perfect” tone
* Ability to speak directly to camera
**LOCATION** 
* London, Battersea Power 
** SHOOT DETAILS**
* Shoot date: TBC (mid-April)
* Casting deadline: **20th April (URGENT)**
** COMPENSATION **
* **Unpaid project**
* Travel (London zones) covered
* Food & drinks provided during the shoot
* Film credit + material for showreel
** TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

Please DM or apply via StarNow https://www.starnow.com/casting_director/applicants/production/3141318/

** TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

Please DM or apply via StarNow https://www.starnow.com/casting_director/applicants/production/3141318/

Had my headshots done today by the amazing Jacqui Mcsweeney Headshots.

https://www.jacquimcsweeney.com/

what a beautiful person with incredible talent.

I was given time, compassion and direction that was second to none. I highly recommend and I’m so happy that I’ve now found my headshot photographer for the future. Blessed to have found and met you. So excited to share your work with the world! Thank you 🙏🏻 #headshot #headshotsession #actorheadshots #proffessionalphotography #brighton

items.text:
Hi everyone! I wanted to introduce myself. I’m an actor and filmmaker currently based in Los Angeles.

I have 5 years of acting experience working in South America , and I recently moved to LA to continue my training in acting and film production.

I’m passionate about storytelling, especially projects with emotional depth and strong visual style. I’m currently looking to collaborate on short films, indie projects, and creative work where I can grow and contribute.

If you have any upcoming projects or casting opportunities, I’d love to connect!

IG: https://www.instagram.com/migueavalos_

IMDb: https://www.imdb.com/name/nm16049400/?ref_=ext_shr_lnk

sharedPost.text:
Anna McAuley Casting is seeking the following people for a coffee company commercial: 
🎧 Music producers
🧶 Knitters
📝 Writers
🎸 Indie band and singers
🎨 Comic book artists

Filming: W/C 11 May (London and UK)
Featured role: £370 BSF / £3000 buyout
Walk-on role: £500

We’re open on age (18+), ethnicity, gender. 
Applicants must be available for all dates.
No previous acting experience needed.

Please apply with full name, location,
selfie and a short written intro to: hello@mcauleycasting.com with the subject relating to which role you’re applying for.

Please apply with full name, location, selfie and a short written intro to: hello@mcauleycasting.com with the subject: 'Coffee Commercial -Comic Book Artist' ANNA MCAULEYCASTING MCAULEY'

items.text:
HERE’S WHY EVERYONE IS TALKING ABOUT ‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ THE PLAY RIGHT NOW…
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!

ONLY ONE WEEK RUN LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL & REAL PLAY BASED ON TRUE EVENTS!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here - SELLING FAST!

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS JUST £12.50 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

CAST 

@theflyingscotsmann 

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx 

@em_jsmith 

@sebastianvscott 

@esmepemburysmith 

@jonnymonk800m 

@samantha_oactor 

ASSISTANT DIRECTOR/STAGE MANAGER - @ermydecarvalho 

FOOTAGE BY - @jason_perryman 

PHOTOS BY - @build.better.stories 

#dramaticplay

#mustsee

#londontheatre

#actors

#whatsoninlondon
